title: Tao Te Ching 65
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 65 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 65 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: In ancient times those who practiced the Tao did not enlighten the people but kept them simple.
